    Is Your AC Showing These Signs?

    If you're experiencing any of these issues, it's time to call in the professionals for a deep AC clean.

    Weak Cooling

    Your AC runs constantly but the air coming out isn't cold enough to cool the room.

    Bad Smell

    Musty or unpleasant odors coming from your AC vents every time you switch it on.

    Water Leakage

    Water dripping or pooling around the indoor unit, risking damage to walls and ceilings.

    High Electricity Bills

    Your DEWA bills keep climbing every month despite no change in your AC usage patterns.

    Dusty Air

    Visible dust particles blowing out of the vents and settling on your furniture.

    Noisy Operation

    Unusual rattling, buzzing or grinding sounds when your AC is running.

    Before vs After Cleaning

    See the transformation our professional AC cleaning service delivers.

    ✕

    Before Cleaning

    • ✕
      Weak airflow from vents
    • ✕
      Higher DEWA bills every month
    • ✕
      Dust and allergens in the air
    • ✕
      Unpleasant odor from AC
    Recommended
    ✓

    After Cleaning

    • ✓
      Strong, consistent cooling
    • ✓
      Better indoor air quality
    • ✓
      Lower energy usage & bills
    • ✓
      Fresh, clean air throughout

    What's Included

    Our comprehensive AC cleaning service covers every component of your cooling system.

    Indoor Unit Deep Cleaning

    Complete dismantling and deep cleaning of all indoor unit components including coils and blower wheel.

    Outdoor Unit Cleaning

    Thorough cleaning of the condenser unit to remove dirt and debris, improving heat exchange efficiency.

    Filter Sanitization

    Anti-bacterial treatment and sanitization of filters to eliminate mold, bacteria and allergens.

    Drain Line Inspection

    Complete inspection and clearing of condensate drain lines to prevent water leakage and damage.

    Why Choose Afnan

    Six reasons Dubai homeowners trust us with their AC cleaning needs.

    Licensed Company

    Fully licensed LLC in Dubai with trade license #1571076.

    Certified Technicians

    Trained and certified AC technicians with years of field experience.

    Premium Equipment

    Professional-grade tools and cleaning equipment for the best results.

    No hidden charges. You pay exactly what was quoted upfront.

    Same-Day Service

    Available 7 days a week with same-day appointments in Dubai.

    Satisfaction Guaranteed

    We're not done until you're completely satisfied with the results.
